title: A Nymphoid Barbarian in Dinosaur Hell
original_title: A Nymphoid Barbarian in Dinosaur Hell
overview: In a post-Armageddon world, a young woman finds herself in a fight for survival against mutant cavemen, dinosaurs and other prehistoric animals.
